description: Sample data-fill demo: each story produces a few verdict rows in state/verdicts.jsonl. The default acceptance gate is the parameterized 5-gate JsonlSchemaGate.

userStories.title: BATCH-001 · 4 sentiment-classification tasks
userStories.description: Read .ralph/stories/batch-001.jsonl (4 lines), classify each sentence sentiment in {positive, negative, neutral}.
acceptanceCriteria: verdicts.jsonl contains exactly 4 rows for this batch
Each verdict.qa is one of positive/negative/neutral
reason length ≥ 80 characters for ≥ 90% of rows
At least 2 distinct qa values across the batch (or 1 if n_tasks ≤ 5)
